title: elaphoglossum spatulatum
intro: Elaphoglossum spatulatum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic or terrestrial fern found in Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum spatulatum include the potential relief from pain and inflammation, as well as the protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Elaphoglossum spatulatum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
